items.title: Asian FX: Sideways as Hormuz risks linger – OCBC
items.summary: OCBC strategists Christopher Wong and Sim Moh Siong note that Asian FX, including South Korean Won (KRW), has traded slightly firmer on hopes of de-escalation in the Middle East, but stresses that geopolitics remains the
